headline: Citi Keeps Buy Rating on Northrop Grumman (NOC)
summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) is one of the 9 Most Oversold Strong Buy-Rated Stocks to Invest In Now. On July 1, 2026, Citi lowered its price target on Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) to $587 from $628 and kept a Buy rating. Citi updated estimates and price targets across the aerospace and defense group ahead of […]
